title: hieracium scanicum
intro: Hieracium scanicum, also known as Devil's-bit scabious, is a perennial plant belonging to the dandelion family with yellow flowers. The medicinal properties of Hieracium scanicum lie in its leaves, roots, and flowers, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems. The health benefits of Hieracium scanicum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of eczema, acne, and other skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Hieracium scanicum is often used in infusions, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
